name: API key hardcoded in source
description: Introduces a live API key as a string literal in the module. Credentials in source leak via git history and must come from the environment.
diff:
--- a/config.py
+++ b/config.py
@@ -1,5 +1,8 @@
+API_KEY = "sk-live-9f2c4a8e1b7d3c5a9e0f2b4d6c8a0e2f4a6b8c0d"
+
 def get_client():
-    return Client(api_key=os.environ["API_KEY"])
+    return Client(api_key=API_KEY)
